dateline: Tampa, Florida — All 7 BTS Members Depart for US Tour; Merch Sales Open; North America Leg Opens in Two Days
heroHeadline: BTS Arrives in US: All 7 Members Depart Incheon as Tampa Merch Sales Open Ahead of April 25 Stadium Opener
heroSubtitle: 4,697 days since debut: all seven BTS members departed Incheon International Airport on April 23 for the ARIRANG World Tour North America leg, arriving ahead of three sold-out shows at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL (April 25, 26, 28; ~195,000 total fans). Merchandise sales opened at the stadium. HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk's arrest warrant remains pending before Seoul courts. 'SWIM' has topped the Billboard Global 200 for four consecutive weeks.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Korea Herald, Yonhap, Bloomberg, Variety, AP News, UPI, Starnews Korea, Rolling Stone, PBS NewsHour, Euronews, City of Tampa, Business Observer Florida, WTSP Tampa Bay, Sportskeeda, and Recording Academy.
